channel.title: My Car Story With Lou Page
channel.description: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1970 Oldsmobile Cutlass W-31 in white
item.description: White paint, a 350 cubic inch engine, and a 4-speed gearbox — the 1970 Cutlass W-31 is a rare and underrated piece of muscle car history that deserves far more attention. Had you heard of the W-31 before?

media:content.media:title: The 1970 Oldsmobile Cutlass W-31 in white
media:content.media:description: White paint, a 350 cubic inch engine, and a 4-speed gearbox — the 1970 Cutlass W-31 is a rare and underrated piece of muscle car history that deserves far more attention. Had you heard of the W-31 before?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Behind the wheel of a 1931 Ford Model A
item.description: There is something truly special about driving a 1931 Ford Model A — a connection to the road and to history that modern cars simply cannot replicate. When did you last experience a classic like this?

media:content.media:title: Behind the wheel of a 1931 Ford Model A
media:content.media:description: There is something truly special about driving a 1931 Ford Model A — a connection to the road and to history that modern cars simply cannot replicate. When did you last experience a classic like this?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1969 Plymouth Barracuda Hemi Under Glass
item.description: The Hemi Under Glass Barracuda is one of drag racing's most theatrical icons — a rear-engine 1969 Plymouth built to wheelstand and thrill crowds. Watch it fire up and do exactly what it was born to do

media:content.media:title: The 1969 Plymouth Barracuda Hemi Under Glass
media:content.media:description: The Hemi Under Glass Barracuda is one of drag racing's most theatrical icons — a rear-engine 1969 Plymouth built to wheelstand and thrill crowds. Watch it fire up and do exactly what it was born to do
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The legendary 1953 Ford Country Squire Wagon
item.description: The 1953 Ford Country Squire is one of the most beloved wagons in American automotive history — wood-trimmed, beautifully proportioned, and a rolling reminder of a golden era. Would you drive a classic wagon today?

media:content.media:title: The legendary 1953 Ford Country Squire Wagon
media:content.media:description: The 1953 Ford Country Squire is one of the most beloved wagons in American automotive history — wood-trimmed, beautifully proportioned, and a rolling reminder of a golden era. Would you drive a classic wagon today?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1969 Dodge Monaco revisited
item.description: The 1969 Dodge Monaco is a full-size classic with presence to spare — long lines, bold design, and a place in American automotive history that is hard to overlook. How does the Monaco stack up against its contemporaries?

media:content.media:title: The 1969 Dodge Monaco revisited
media:content.media:description: The 1969 Dodge Monaco is a full-size classic with presence to spare — long lines, bold design, and a place in American automotive history that is hard to overlook. How does the Monaco stack up against its contemporaries?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1971 Ford Boss Mustang in all its glory
item.description: The 1971 Ford Boss Mustang is pure muscle car royalty — aggressive looks, a powerful engine, and a legacy that continues to captivate collectors and enthusiasts alike. Is this the greatest Mustang ever made?

media:content.media:title: The 1971 Ford Boss Mustang in all its glory
media:content.media:description: The 1971 Ford Boss Mustang is pure muscle car royalty — aggressive looks, a powerful engine, and a legacy that continues to captivate collectors and enthusiasts alike. Is this the greatest Mustang ever made?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The iconic 1956 Chevrolet Nomad
item.description: The 1956 Chevrolet Nomad is one of the most distinctive wagons ever to roll off an American production line. Sleek, stylish, and as desirable today as it was nearly 70 years ago. Would you take one home?

media:content.media:title: The iconic 1956 Chevrolet Nomad
media:content.media:description: The 1956 Chevrolet Nomad is one of the most distinctive wagons ever to roll off an American production line. Sleek, stylish, and as desirable today as it was nearly 70 years ago. Would you take one home?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1977 Chevy Camaro Bumblebee build (
item.description: This 1977 Chevrolet Camaro wears the iconic Bumblebee tribute livery with style — a head-turning build that bridges classic American muscle and pop culture in one unforgettable package. Does this Camaro do the legend justice? (

media:content.media:title: The 1977 Chevy Camaro Bumblebee build (
media:content.media:description: This 1977 Chevrolet Camaro wears the iconic Bumblebee tribute livery with style — a head-turning build that bridges classic American muscle and pop culture in one unforgettable package. Does this Camaro do the legend justice? (
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A flawless 1940 Willys Coupe custom build
item.description: This 1940 Willys Coupe custom is a masterclass in pre-war styling meets modern craftsmanship. Every panel, every detail — brought together into one truly flawless result. What do you love most about custom builds from this era?

media:content.media:title: A flawless 1940 Willys Coupe custom build
media:content.media:description: This 1940 Willys Coupe custom is a masterclass in pre-war styling meets modern craftsmanship. Every panel, every detail — brought together into one truly flawless result. What do you love most about custom builds from this era?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Classic Elegance ’71 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible
item.description: Style and sophistication in motion. What makes the ’71 Cougar XR7 Convertible a timeless classic?

media:content.media:title: Classic Elegance ’71 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible
media:content.media:description: Style and sophistication in motion. What makes the ’71 Cougar XR7 Convertible a timeless classic?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1970 Oldsmobile 442 up close
item.description: The 1970 Oldsmobile 442 remains one of the most respected muscle cars of its era — bold styling, serious power, and a reputation that has only grown with time. What makes the 442 stand out for you?

media:content.media:title: The 1970 Oldsmobile 442 up close
media:content.media:description: The 1970 Oldsmobile 442 remains one of the most respected muscle cars of its era — bold styling, serious power, and a reputation that has only grown with time. What makes the 442 stand out for you?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A pristine 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham
item.description: Few cars from 1958 have survived in this condition. This Cadillac Eldorado Brougham is a stunning example of American luxury at its finest — every detail preserved just as it left the factory. Have you ever seen one this clean?

media:content.media:title: A pristine 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham
media:content.media:description: Few cars from 1958 have survived in this condition. This Cadillac Eldorado Brougham is a stunning example of American luxury at its finest — every detail preserved just as it left the factory. Have you ever seen one this clean?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1960 Chrysler Windsor Wagon – Stunning Two‑Tone Paint
item.description: Family practicality meets striking style. What makes this Windsor Wagon a true standout of the ’60s?

media:content.media:title: 1960 Chrysler Windsor Wagon – Stunning Two‑Tone Paint
media:content.media:description: Family practicality meets striking style. What makes this Windsor Wagon a true standout of the ’60s?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Classic ’70 Olds Toronado GT
item.description: Front‑wheel drive meets muscle. Why was the ’70 Toronado GT such a groundbreaking ride?

media:content.media:title: Classic ’70 Olds Toronado GT
media:content.media:description: Front‑wheel drive meets muscle. Why was the ’70 Toronado GT such a groundbreaking ride?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1941 Continental: The Birth of an Icon
item.description: A design ahead of its time. Why is the ’41 Continental remembered as the start of a legend?

media:content.media:title: 1941 Continental: The Birth of an Icon
media:content.media:description: A design ahead of its time. Why is the ’41 Continental remembered as the start of a legend?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Not Your Ordinary ’88 Chevrolet Corvette
item.description: A Corvette with a twist. What unique features set this ’88 apart from the rest?

media:content.media:title: Not Your Ordinary ’88 Chevrolet Corvette
media:content.media:description: A Corvette with a twist. What unique features set this ’88 apart from the rest?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page
